---
title: "Filesystem Organizing API"
description: "Python API for visualizing file sizes and identifying file bloat to guide user file management."
date: "2024-07"
categories: [Python, API, CI/CD]
---

## Overview

Co-authored a Python API using Git, CI/CD, and test-driven development. The API visualizes file sizes and identifies file bloat to guide user file management.

## Approach

- Designed an API that scans and analyzes filesystem structure
- Implemented file size visualization and bloat detection
- Developed with test-driven methodology and continuous integration

## Tools & Technologies

- Python
- Git
- CI/CD pipelines
- Test-driven development
